candidates.name: Bone fracture code list
candidates.reason: Project-owned SNOMED code list created for fracture history criteria.

mappings.reason: Reviewed mapping for an extracted condition surface used in fracture-history exclusion criteria. This maps the atomic surface 'Bone fractures' to the project FRACTURE ConceptSet; temporal scope and anatomical exclusions remain criterion logic, not terminology lookup.
mappings.provenance: NCT06524960 criterion #17 surfaced as an unmapped free-text condition during patient-evidence calibration.

mappings.reason: Requires right-heart catheterization/hemodynamic observations not modeled in the current Synthea patient profile.

candidates.name: Systolic blood pressure

mappings.reason: Generic blood pressure must be decomposed or specified as systolic/diastolic before predicate execution.

candidates.name: Aspartate aminotransferase
candidates.reason: Synthea carries AST as LOINC 1920-8 in serum/plasma observations.

mappings.reason: Reviewed AST measurement surface maps to the project AST ConceptSet. ULN multiplier semantics remain unit/normal-range compiler logic.
mappings.provenance: 2026-05-11 compiler-review group for hepatic lab criteria.

candidates.name: Serum creatinine
candidates.reason: The active Synthea vocabulary primarily carries creatinine as LOINC 38483-4.

candidates.name: Glucose
candidates.reason: The active Synthea vocabulary carries blood glucose as LOINC 2339-0.

mappings.reason: Reviewed fasting-glucose surface maps to the available Synthea glucose observation; fasting state is not separately modeled.

candidates.name: Glucose

mappings.reason: Reviewed FPG abbreviation maps to the available Synthea glucose observation; fasting state is not separately modeled.
mappings.provenance: 2026-05-11 compiler-review group for glucose thresholds.

candidates.name: Systolic blood pressure
